title: La Vega Cove
description: Modpack with approved mods for the La Vega High School Esports server.
body:
Approved mods for use on the La Vega High School server with easy distribution throughout my lab. Main additions are for recording content (Distant-Horizons and shaders) and controller support for those of you who connect through Bedrock from home, but a little better for your production creation while here at school.

Our paper server includes the plugin for Distant-Horizons, so you should be able to receive that data as well.
